visual.name: SchedulePro
visual.description: Interactive project schedule visual for Power BI: a Primavera-style Gantt chart with a collapsible WBS grid, an S-Curve & Histogram for planned-vs-actual progress, and a Progress Summary Table. Import P6 XER files, switch between projects, and brand it as your own.

dataRoles.name: projectData
dataRoles.description: Drag one raw-XER column per project. Multiple fields = multiple projects. Overrides the Levels ID wells below.

dataRoles.name: projectBaseline
dataRoles.description: Optional baseline raw-XER column per project, paired by field position with Project Data (1st-1st, 2nd-2nd, ...).
